_doc: Pinned generator + template versions — the OpenAPI/buf/protobuf determinism pattern: same source + same versions => byte-identical derived output. Bump a robot's version ONLY when its OUTPUT FORMAT changes. gen_manifest records these + content hashes into spec/derived/BUILD_MANIFEST.json (the reproducibility receipt), which check_generated drift-gates. This is what makes 'regenerate over edit' safe across machines and time.
